entities.name: WEST AFRICA
entities.description: A region highly vulnerable to climate change impacts due to exposure and low adaptive capacity

entities.name: CLIMATE CHANGE
entities.description: A global phenomenon inducing rainfall variability and increased aridity

entities.name: RAINFALL VARIABILITY
entities.description: An increase in the variation of rainfall patterns induced by climate change

entities.name: WATER RESOURCES
entities.description: Natural water supplies affected by rainfall variability

entities.name: ECOSYSTEM SERVICES
entities.description: Benefits provided by ecosystems, affected by rainfall variability

entities.name: AGRICULTURAL PRODUCTION
entities.description: The process of producing crops and livestock, affected by rainfall variability

entities.name: ARIDITY
entities.description: A state of increased dryness requiring adaptation strategies from farmers

entities.name: SOIL AND WATER CONSERVATION TECHNIQUES
entities.description: Indigenous and modern coping strategies used to adapt to increased aridity

entities.name: DROUGHT-TOLERANT CROPS
entities.description: Crop varieties used as a coping strategy to adapt to increased aridity

entities.name: CROP DIVERSIFICATION
entities.description: A coping strategy involving the cultivation of multiple crop species to adapt to aridity

entities.name: CLIMATE INFORMATION SERVICES
entities.description: Services providing climate data to support decision-making in farming, pastoral, and fishing systems

entities.name: FARMING MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems for managing agricultural production improved by climate information services

entities.name: PASTORAL MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems for managing livestock improved by climate information services

entities.name: FISHING MANAGEMENT SYSTEMS
entities.description: Systems for managing fisheries improved by climate information services

entities.name: SENEGAL
entities.description: The country where the assessment of climate information services uptake was conducted

entities.name: PARTICIPATORY METHODS
entities.description: Approaches used to involve stakeholders in the uptake process of climate information services

entities.name: STAKEHOLDER CONSULTATIONS
entities.description: A participatory method used to involve producers, technicians, and policy-makers

entities.name: INTERVIEWS
entities.description: A participatory method used to gather information from stakeholders

entities.name: FIELD DEMONSTRATIONS
entities.description: A participatory method used to show the practical application of climate information services

entities.name: TRAINING WORKSHOPS
entities.description: A participatory method used to train users in the effective use of climate information services

entities.name: SMS
entities.description: An innovative communication channel used for the delivery of climate information services

entities.name: VOICE MESSAGES
entities.description: An innovative communication channel used for the delivery of climate information services

entities.name: RADIOS
entities.description: An innovative communication channel used for the delivery of climate information services

entities.name: MOBILE APPLICATIONS
entities.description: An innovative communication channel used for the delivery of climate information services

entities.name: CLIMATE ADVISORY BODIES
entities.description: Bodies created in districts to support the governance and uptake of climate information services

entities.name: WEATHER-BASED INDEX INSURANCE
entities.description: A financial tool recommended to incite producers to subscribe to climate services

relationships.description: used to involve stakeholders in uptake
